name: CSIDA
summary: Cross-domain gesture dataset providing original and processed CSI together with gesture, environment, location, and person labels.

hardware.platform: Two laptops with one transmit and three receive antennas

settings.scenario: Six gestures at five locations across two rooms

standardization.notes: The original source reports Atheros AR9580; this corrects the Intel 5300 platform shown in CSI-Bench Table 1.
